text:
Created attachment 238529
Patch for stunnel

* Add separate mirror for http
* Define GPLv2+ license
* Remove upstreamed patch

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Compile tested on FreeBSD FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p1 (arm64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)
